seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is a 33-year-old female
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient presents for evaluation of joint pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's main joint pain is in both knees
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's knee pain has been associated with doing more stair-type workouts
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports no other joint pain such as in elbows or shoulders
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient had a right rotator cuff repair about two years ago
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has had no problems with the right shoulder since the rotator cuff repair
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies pins and needles in the feet
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies swelling in the legs
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has diabetes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient monitors for neuropathic or vascular complications because of diabetes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports blood sugars have been under control
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies fever or chills
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies nausea or vomiting
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies chest pain and shortness of breath
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has hypertension
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient monitors blood pressure and takes medication for hypertension
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports blood pressure has not elevated since onset of joint pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient takes Norvasc 5 mg once daily for hypertension
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has been taking Norvasc 5 mg daily consistently
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's blood pressure is elevated during this visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician suspects the elevated blood pressure may be due to nervousness
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's neck is soft with no enlarged thyroid
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's heart has a regular rate and rhythm
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's lungs are clear
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's abdomen is soft
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's left knee has slight erythema and edema with a small effusion
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient has decreased flexion and extension of the left knee
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's lower extremity strength is good
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The left knee x-ray is normal
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician assesses that the patient may have a strain in the knees
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's white blood cell count is not elevated
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician is not concerned about an infection based on the white blood cell count
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's hemoglobin A1c is mildly elevated
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to continue the current diabetes regimen despite mildly elevated A1c
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order autoimmune labs to work up the left knee pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to refer the patient to physical therapy for knee pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to prescribe an anti-inflammatory medication for knee pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician orders meloxicam 15 mg once daily
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician orders a physical therapy referral
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician orders an autoimmune profile
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician advises the patient to continue monitoring blood pressure at home
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician asks the patient to send a home blood pressure report in the next couple of weeks
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a blood pressure cuff at home
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician orders a lipid profile
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician
